mapper.select: SELECT state_id as "stateId", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.cart_flat GROUP BY state_id
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.cart_flat WHERE state_id = 'ABANDONED' AND customer_id = #{userId} AND customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%')

SELECT cart_id as "id", customer_id as "userId", customer_name as "customerName", customer_email as "customerEmail", subtotal as "subtotal", currency as "currency", discount_amount as "discountAmount", total as "total", item_count as "itemCount", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", created_time as "createdTime", last_modified_time as "lastModifiedTime" FROM hm_query.cart_flat WHERE state_id = 'ABANDONED' AND customer_id = #{userId} AND customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%') ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT cart_id as "id", customer_id as "userId", customer_name as "customerName", subtotal as "subtotal", currency as "currency", discount_amount as "discountAmount", total as "total", item_count as "itemCount", expires_at as "expiresAt", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", created_time as "createdTime", last_modified_time as "lastModifiedTime" FROM hm_query.cart_flat WHERE state_id = 'EXPIRED' AND customer_id = #{userId} ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT cart_id as "id", customer_id as "userId", session_id as "sessionId", subtotal as "subtotal", currency as "currency", coupon_codes as "couponCodes", discount_amount as "discountAmount", total as "total", item_count as "itemCount", expires_at as "expiresAt", notes as "notes", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", created_time as "createdTime", last_modified_time as "lastModifiedTime" FROM hm_query.cart_flat WHERE customer_id = #{userId} AND state_id = #{stateId} ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT cart_id as "id", customer_id as "userId", session_id as "sessionId", subtotal as "subtotal", currency as "currency", coupon_codes as "couponCodes", discount_amount as "discountAmount", total as "total", item_count as "itemCount", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", created_time as "createdTime", last_modified_time as "lastModifiedTime" FROM hm_query.cart_flat WHERE customer_id = #{userId} AND state_id = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY last_modified_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT DISTINCT cart_id FROM hm_query.cart_items_flat WHERE variant_id = #{variantId} AND cart_state IN ('ACTIVE', 'CHECKOUT_INITIATED')
SELECT cart_id FROM hm_query.cart_flat WHERE coupon_codes LIKE CONCAT('%', #{couponCode}, '%') AND state_id IN ('ACTIVE', 'CHECKOUT_INITIATED')
SELECT cart_id FROM hm_query.cart_flat WHERE expires_at < NOW() AND state_id IN ('ACTIVE', 'ABANDONED', 'CHECKOUT_INITIATED')
SELECT cart_id FROM hm_query.cart_flat WHERE state_id = 'ACTIVE' AND last_modified_time < (NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' * #{thresholdHours})
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.cart_items_flat WHERE cart_id = #{cartId}

SELECT item_id as "id", cart_id as "cartId", product_id as "productId", variant_id as "variantId", sku as "sku", product_name as "productName", supplier_id as "supplierId", quantity as "quantity", unit_price as "unitPrice", line_total as "lineTotal", created_time as "createdTime", last_modified_time as "lastModifiedTime", tenant as "tenant" FROM hm_query.cart_items_flat WHERE cart_id = #{cartId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.cart_items_flat WHERE cart_id = #{cartId}

SELECT f.cart_id as "cartId", f.customer_id as "userId", f.customer_name as "customerName", f.customer_email as "customerEmail", f.session_id as "sessionId", f.subtotal as "subtotal", f.currency as "currency", f.coupon_codes as "couponCodes", f.discount_amount as "discountAmount", f.total as "total", f.expires_at as "expiresAt", f.notes as "notes", f.description as "description", f.state_id as "stateId", f.flow_id as "flowId", f.created_time as "cartCreatedTime", f.last_modified_time as "cartLastModifiedTime", f.last_modified_by as "lastModifiedBy", f.created_by as "createdBy", f.tenant as "tenant", f.version as "version", f.state_entry_time as "stateEntryTime", ci.item_id as "itemId", ci.product_id as "productId", ci.variant_id as "variantId", ci.sku as "sku", ci.product_name as "productName", ci.supplier_id as "supplierId", ci.quantity as "quantity", ci.unit_price as "unitPrice", ci.line_total as "lineTotal", ci.created_time as "itemCreatedTime", ci.last_modified_time as "itemLastModifiedTime" FROM hm_query.cart_flat f LEFT JOIN hm_query.cart_items_flat ci ON ci.cart_id = f.cart_id WHERE f.cart_id = #{cartId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.cart_activity_flat WHERE cart_id = #{cartId}

SELECT id as "id", cart_id as "cartId", activity_name as "activityName", activity_success as "activitySuccess", activity_comment as "activityComment", created_time as "createdTime", created_by as "createdBy" FROM hm_query.cart_activity_flat WHERE cart_id = #{cartId} ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.cart_flat f LEFT JOIN hm_query.cart_items_flat ci ON ci.cart_id = f.cart_id LEFT JOIN hm_query.cart_activity_flat al ON al.cart_id = f.cart_id WHERE f.cart_id = #{cartId}

SELECT f.cart_id as "cartId", f.customer_id as "userId", f.customer_name as "customerName", f.session_id as "sessionId", f.subtotal as "subtotal", f.currency as "currency", f.coupon_codes as "couponCodes", f.discount_amount as "discountAmount", f.total as "total", f.expires_at as "expiresAt", f.notes as "notes", f.description as "description", f.state_id as "stateId", f.flow_id as "flowId", f.created_time as "cartCreatedTime", f.last_modified_time as "cartLastModifiedTime", f.last_modified_by as "lastModifiedBy", f.created_by as "createdBy", f.tenant as "tenant", f.version as "version", f.state_entry_time as "stateEntryTime", f.sla_yellow_date as "slaYellowDate", f.sla_red_date as "slaRedDate", f.sla_tending_late as "slaTendingLate", f.sla_late as "slaLate", ci.item_id as "itemId", ci.product_id as "productId", ci.variant_id as "variantId", ci.sku as "sku", ci.product_name as "productName", ci.supplier_id as "supplierId", ci.quantity as "quantity", ci.unit_price as "unitPrice", ci.line_total as "lineTotal", ci.created_time as "itemCreatedTime", ci.last_modified_time as "itemLastModifiedTime", al.id as "activityId", al.activity_name as "activityName", al.activity_success as "activitySuccess", al.activity_comment as "activityComment", al.created_time as "activityCreatedTime" FROM hm_query.cart_flat f LEFT JOIN hm_query.cart_items_flat ci ON ci.cart_id = f.cart_id LEFT JOIN hm_query.cart_activity_flat al ON al.cart_id = f.cart_id WHERE f.cart_id = #{cartId} ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT ci.cart_id as "cartId", ci.customer_id as "userId", ci.cart_subtotal as "subtotal", ci.cart_currency as "currency", ci.cart_coupon_codes as "couponCodes", ci.cart_discount as "discountAmount", ci.cart_total as "total", ci.cart_state as "stateId", ci.item_id as "itemId", ci.variant_id as "variantId", ci.product_id as "productId", ci.sku as "sku", ci.quantity as "quantity", ci.unit_price as "unitPrice", ci.line_total as "lineTotal", ci.product_name as "productName", ci.brand as "brand", ci.product_slug as "productSlug", ci.category_name as "categoryName", ci.variant_color as "variantColor", ci.variant_size as "variantSize", ci.image_url as "imageUrl", ci.available_quantity as "availableQuantity", ci.stock_status as "stockStatus" FROM hm_query.cart_items_flat ci WHERE ci.customer_id = #{userId} AND ci.cart_state IN ('ACTIVE', 'CHECKOUT_INITIATED') ORDER BY ci.created_time ASC ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.cart_items_flat WHERE cart_id = #{cartId}

SELECT ci.cart_id as "cartId", ci.customer_id as "userId", ci.cart_subtotal as "subtotal", ci.cart_currency as "currency", ci.cart_coupon_codes as "couponCodes", ci.cart_discount as "discountAmount", ci.cart_total as "total", ci.cart_state as "stateId", ci.item_id as "itemId", ci.variant_id as "variantId", ci.product_id as "productId", ci.sku as "sku", ci.quantity as "quantity", ci.unit_price as "unitPrice", ci.line_total as "lineTotal", ci.product_name as "productName", ci.brand as "brand", ci.product_slug as "productSlug", ci.category_name as "categoryName", ci.variant_color as "variantColor", ci.variant_size as "variantSize", ci.image_url as "imageUrl", ci.available_quantity as "availableQuantity", ci.stock_status as "stockStatus" FROM hm_query.cart_items_flat ci WHERE ci.cart_id = #{cartId} ORDER BY ci.created_time ASC ${pagination}
